title: Writing & Training a Science Bowl Practice CLI
synopsis: Writing a simple CLI for science bowl practice. Involves training models for extracting questions as well as question judging. Doing it just to brush up on my classifiers/tokenizers.

title: Cross-compiling ROS2 for iPhone
synopsis: Cross-compiling ROS2 for iPhone. Goal is to bundle basic node and messaging functionality, and maybe a localized python for quick testing purposes. Who knows about the last part.

title: Sensor-based Updraft Detection
synopsis: Attempting to detect updrafts solely with sensors (barometer, altimeter, thermometer, etc) on embedded systems with minimal error. Large-scale maps or intensive computational models cannot run, for obvious reasons
